posts.author: Sallyanne01 (Sallyanne)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, is there a way I can create a WorkForm which will be used as a Voting System for Employee of the Month. Will need to have Text Columns for the person name and the reason why they are getting a vote.
Will also need to know how to have the votes/results hidden by users with exception of a couple…

Is this possible???

posts.author: edarling85 (Wild 6 | Eric Darling)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, did you want to book a call to talk through this?

posts.author: D-Digitals (Daniel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Sallyanne01

Yes, I can set up a WorkForm for Employee of the Month voting with text fields for nominee names and voting reasons. I can also configure result visibility so only authorized individuals can access the votes.

Would you like the voting to be anonymous? How many people should have access to the results? Also, do you need automation, such as automatically calculating the winner?

Let me know your preferences, and I’ll tailor the setup to your needs. Looking forward to working with you.
